title: lastrea pilosissima
intro: Lastrea pilosissima, also known as the hairy fern or walking fern, is a species of fern in the family Athyriaceae, native to tropical and subtropical regions of Asia and Australia. The medicinal properties of Lastrea pilosissima include its use as an anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Lastrea pilosissima include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a diuretic and digestive aid. Lastrea pilosissima can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
